mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_account WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_session(token, user_id, expires_at) VALUES (#{token}, #{userId}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM user_account WHERE lower(email) = lower(#{email}) LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id AS "userId", display_name AS "displayName", email AS "email" FROM user_account WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account(user_id, display_name, email) VALUES (#{userId}, #{displayName}, #{email})
INSERT INTO magic_link_token(token, email, user_id, expires_at) VALUES (#{token}, #{email}, #{userId}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT token AS "token", email AS "email", user_id AS "userId" FROM magic_link_token WHERE token = #{token} AND consumed_at IS NULL AND expires_at > #{now}
mapper.update: UPDATE magic_link_token SET consumed_at = now() WHERE token = #{token} AND consumed_at IS NULL
UPDATE magic_link_token SET consumed_at = now() WHERE lower(email) = lower(#{email}) AND consumed_at IS NULL
